blocks.text: Suzuka at dawn — Russell and Antonelli collide in the 2026 title fight
🏎️ Japanese GP — Suzuka 03:30, Russell leads Antonelli by just 4 points heading in
No wins for anyone in the top five yet this season — zero. Suzuka's relentless technical demands will expose who actually has the faster car in 2026.
🚴 Sun 11:00 — Gent-Wevelgem: Wærenskjold and Abrahamsen chase Norwegian Spring Classic glory
♟️ Wed 16:00 — Carlsen opens FIDE Candidates bid — the road to the World Championship starts here
